title: Greek Chickpea Crumble Pie
description: A citrusy and flaky pie filled with a greek-inspired chickpea filling, topped with a crunchy crumble.
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a pan over medium heat. Add the chickpeas, lemon juice, and olive oil. Cook until the chickpeas are lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour and water to form a dough.
Roll out the dough and place it in a pie dish.
Add the cooked chickpea mixture to the pie crust.
Mix the honey, vanilla extract, and citrusy zest in a bowl. Pour the mixture over the chickpea mixture.
Roll out the crumble and sprinkle it over the pie.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie cool before serving.
